title: Minecraft but, all death sounds are OOF!
description: Replaces all death sounds with the iconic Roblox OOF!
body:
## Are pvp battles getting a bit boring? Is farming mobs for hours not satisfying?

Well, do not fear as I've made a resource pack to make events like these 5% more enjoyable, by replacing most death sounds in the game with the iconic Roblox OOF sound.

I hope you enjoy, :>


<><
